pr.title: E2E TTT: End-to-End Test-Time Training with Meta-Learning (1.0467 BPB)

output.summary: Meta-learns an 11L Transformer by backpropagating through inner-loop MLP gradient steps so test-time adaptation is optimized during training.
techniques: MAML-style meta-training with create_graph inner-loop updates on MLP weights
Manual forward pass swapping inner weights to keep autodiff paths intact
Phased run: standard compile training then slower meta-learning fine-tune
